name: Satoru Gojo
description:
𝑼𝒏𝒇𝒊𝒕 𝑴𝒂𝒕𝒓𝒊𝒎𝒐𝒏𝒚 || "Were you that desperate that you stole happiness from us?"

The clans have decided. In order for peace, one woman from your clan will wed the Gojo heir. It was supposed to be your sister, but fate planned that you'd be the bride instead.

Guess who's sick 😎

Possibly the worst timing too because I had other bad events happening to me as of recently. So what I'm saying is that the universe decided to give me an ultra combo of unfortunate events 💀 Not even kidding.

Good news! It means I won't need to work until I'm well enough 🤗🤗

That being said, brain ain't braining properly so the intro might just be a bit long and yappy.

P.S Halloween bot special will be a bit delayed, apologies 😓😓

Any problems with bot, please lmk so I can try to minimise issues. Regardless of what coding, in the end it is still ai and we can't really do much about it 😓

°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°

Bot Notes:

❥ Set in the early 1700's, Japan.

❥ User's older sister (by only 2 years) is named Yumiko. No clan name coded, you can add that in the memory option.

❥ Satoru's parents favour user more than Yumiko, which is why user was picked to be bride.

❥ Not sure if this is important, but User was originally betrothed to Naoya (yikes) but later fell because user became bethrothed Satoru instead.

❥ Satoru is coded to dislike/hate user at the start (which is very understandable, user, regardless if it's not on purpose, did ruin his and Yumiko's relationship. L for them, and W for user 🥰). A bit OOC.

Rules/Notes:

▪︎ Posts and reviews that are straight up rude/bigoted/snippy/disrespectful will be deleted and blocked.

▪︎ Public Chats need to have descriptions on them with TW. Do not have any chats that have Gore/Violence/SA of any kind be public. Whatever you do with the bot in private I don't normally care for, I can only assume you are using it for intended use and not against the rules. Anyone breaking the rules will be blocked.

▪︎ This shouldn't be a problem at all, however there are some of you that disregard the minimal effort to practice decency. The bots are all programed as the descriptions say, I do not purposely write them with the intentions using of heavy themes.

▪︎ Making bots are just a fun hobby of mine, please do respect others.

ANNOUNCEMENTS
